pr.title: Add frontend testing skill for CCC
pr.body:
Adds a testing skill for the CCC frontend React app documenting auth bypass, key routes, testing tips, and known limitations when testing without a backend.

Devin Session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/a0ba506a3d574e7b8a041065a6b41144
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
